title: Delivery Tags, Acknowledgements, and Redelivery · Go Build Room
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a same-channel terminal delivery decision record, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a same-channel terminal delivery decision record while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Transfer ownership only after the intended durable effect, transactional inbox record, or safely repeatable handoff succeeds; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 8611 during bounded worker pool during a dependency slowdown. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff, keep Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
